pattern: Compute the nth Fibonacci number iteratively with two rolling values to avoid the exponential blowup of naive recursion.
hints: The base cases are zero for index zero and one for index one.
Each value is the sum of the two before it, so you only ever need to remember the last two.
Iterate from two up to n, keeping a running pair and shifting it forward each step until you reach the target index.

stress.description: every index in the valid range covered once
